messages.content: I'm only interested in building our own software solutions. In the past, these types of get togethers gave SaaS venders an audience with folks like me. I have no interest whatsoever with meeting with a SaaS vendor of any kind. If I am incorrect in my assumptions, please let me know.
Thanks for being clear. I appreciate it. :-) Best of luck to you in your future endeavors.

their_response: Thanks for being clear. I appreciate it. :-) Best of luck to you in your future endeavors.
last_reply: Thanks for being clear. I appreciate it. :-) Best of luck to you in your future endeavors.
